name: Music room
description: Intimate recital chamber organised around a single instrument against one wall, with a small audience of stair-seats facing it across a carpet rug. Floor in @floor, walls in @primary, low beamed lintel ceiling for acoustic enclosure. A 3-block @primary bench against the back wall carries 3-4 minecraft:note_block units (the 'piano'); one minecraft:jukebox flanks it for recorded music. A minecraft:bookshelf holds sheet music, two minecraft:lantern provide soft light, and a minecraft:flower_pot adds a decorative touch near the door.

required_furniture.rule: Row of @primary blocks at y = floor + 1 flush with the back wall, with 3-4 minecraft:note_block units on top; an L-cap turns south at one end in larger rooms.
Resting on the instrument bench, one per bench cell; a 4th block sits on the L-cap when the room is wide enough.
Against the west wall, one cell south of the bench, so live music (note_blocks) and recorded music (jukebox) share the same wall.
Row of @stairs facing the instrument (facing=north). Centered along x; 2 seats in a 6-wide room, up to 4 in a 12-wide room.
Sheet-music shelf against the east wall; stacked two high when the ceiling permits.
Mounted near the lintel: one above the instrument, one above the audience. 'Pools of Light' — no torches.
Rug under the audience seats, extending one row toward the instrument so it visually connects performer and listeners.
Decorative pot near the south wall, off the audience axis.

placement_rules: Carpet rug under the audience seats, bridging toward the instrument
Jukebox and bookshelf on side walls flanking the bench, never blocking the seating
Beamed lintel ceiling — sound traps, sight stays open
lighting_ventilation: Two hanging-style lanterns just below the lintel ('Pools of Light'); the beamed ceiling lets a little daylight seep between beams while still creating an acoustic enclosure (Eating Atmosphere).

medieval.notes: Warm oak chamber: oak bench piano, red carpet under audience, iron lanterns. Sheet-music bookshelf reads as illuminated manuscripts.

modern.notes: Recital studio in smooth quartz and andesite, gray rug, smooth-stone audience seating. The note_blocks read as a sleek synthesiser console.

fantasy.notes: Dark-oak performance hall, purple carpet, sea-lantern atmosphere. The bookshelf doubles as a tome of enchanted melodies.
